news_items.headline: Ex-England bowler Plunkett makes pro baseball debut
news_items.summary: Former England fast bowler Liam Plunkett trades the cricket field for the baseball diamond as he makes his professional debut for a minor league team in the United States.

news_items.headline: After 7 years tormenting Padres, Buehler relishes chance to deliver vs. LA
Brewers’ offense breaks through late, takes 6-2 win over Cubs
news_items.summary: Box Score Both the Brewers and Cubs came into this series hot, but it was the Brewers who kept that heat going. Despite a cold opening to the game, they turned on the burners late and defeated the Cubs 6-2. It was their 50th win of the season and fifth win in a row. Jacob […]

news_items.headline: Personal Milestone Check-In: Halfway Edition
news_items.summary: Where are our personal milestones at the halfway point of the season?

news_items.headline: Brewers' Misiorowski hurls 105.5 mph pitch in win
news_items.summary: Brewers starter Jacob Misiorowski threw a first-inning fastball on Friday that was clocked at 105.5 mph, breaking his own record for the fastest pitch recorded by a starting pitcher in the pitch tracking era (since 2008).

news_items.headline: Red Sox place Mayer on IL with forearm injury
news_items.summary: The Red Sox placed infielder Marcelo Mayer on the 10-day injured list because of a left forearm injury Friday.

news_items.headline: Angels fire GM Minasian; tab Mozeliak for revamp
news_items.summary: The Angels fired general manager Perry Minasian on Friday while also announcing that longtime executive John Mozeliak will be brought in as a consultant to the baseball operations department.

news_items.headline: Lindor says Mets players 'failed' ousted Mendoza
news_items.summary: Shortstop Francisco Lindor and president of baseball operations David Stearns were among prominent members of the Mets who assumed responsibility for the team's dismal start after manager Carlos Mendoza's firing earlier Friday.

news_items.headline: Trout unlikely for Home Run Derby due to injury
news_items.summary: Mike Trout said Friday he is unlikely to participate in the All-Star Home Run Derby in Philadelphia because of his strained right hamstring.

news_items.headline: White Sox rout K.C. 22-1, their most runs since '7...
news_items.summary: Tristan Peters hit a grand slam and had six RBIs, Miguel Vargas had a three-run homer and an RBI double in Chicago's 10-run third inning, and the White Sox routed the Kansas City Royals 22-1 on Friday night.

news_items.headline: ⚾ Biggest strengths for top playoff contenders
news_items.summary: For clubs currently leading the postseason hunt, here's the one thing driving their success so far.

news_items.headline: 'Got some DayQuil in me': How Tolle spun a career outing vs. Yanks in 'flu game'
Braves potpourri of pitching leads to 3-1 win over Giants
news_items.summary: The Braves used six pitchers on Friday night to snap their four-game losing skid and finally get a west coast win, taking down the San Francisco Giants, 3-1, at Oracle Park on a foggy night. Reynaldo Lopez started the game and was shaky in the first, allowing San Francisco’s lone run to score. Despite decreased […]

news_items.headline: What The Pavel Dorofeyev Trade Means For Direction Of Rangers' Retool
news_items.source: The Hockey News - New York Rangers
news_items.summary: The New York Rangers made their first significant move of the offseason, acquiring Pavel Dorofeyev in exchange for the 26th overall pick in the 2026 NHL Draft, a 2026 third-round pick (92 overall), and a 2028 top-10 protected first-round pick.

news_items.headline: Dodgers 2026 game results
news_items.summary: Keeping track of every game this season, all in one place

news_items.headline: Roki Sasaki struggles with command early, Dodgers fall to Padres
news_items.summary: Roki Sasaki was pulled in the fifth inning after command issues flared up and the Dodgers suffered a 7-1 loss to the Padres Friday at Petco Park.
